display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use pipes.sh; source_facts.homepage points to github.com/pipeseroni/pipes.sh.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project documentation surface linked by source_facts.homepage/repo.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/pipeseroni/pipes.sh; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies terminal screensaver behavior; source_facts.executables lists pipes.sh; official README documents Bash/ncurses terminal usage.
